title: Chemistry
body:
Chemistry is a very complex science, but not with this modification! Add unique ores, items, chemical stations, and even a molecular kitchen to your world! An unstable station will allow you to genetically modify plants and maximize your benefits. Don't forget the special Acid Pickaxe _(yes, that's what it's called)_ that digs 1 block by 3! 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Amogus

</details>
